arts.ttl: Atalanta vs. Fiorentina: battle for three points
arts.sum: There is a perfect balance across the last nine matches between Atalanta and Fiorentina at Bergamo in Serie A: three wins each and three draws (success for the Viola in the most recent one on 2 June). Cristiano Biraghi`s first of eight goals from a direct free kick in Serie A came against Atalanta, on 30th September 2018 with Fiorentina.

arts.ttl: Palladino ‘energised’ by president’s visit, ready for Atalanta challenge
arts.sum: Fiorentina manager Raffaele Palladino spoke to the club’s official media ahead of their upcoming match against Atalanta at the Gewiss Stadium. The coach expressed optimism about his team’s preparation and the impact of recent events. Palladino began by discussing the international break: “I believe the break came at the right moment. We had many players arrive on the last day of the transfer market. These days have helped us get to know the late arrivals better. We’ve worked well, and I’ve seen greater unity. We’re ready for the challenge against Atalanta.” When asked if fans could expect a different Fiorentina, The post Palladino ‘energised’ by president’s visit, ready for Atalanta challenge appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina director reveals failed attempt to sign Vitor Roque from Barcelona
arts.sum: Daniele Pradè, Fiorentina’s sporting director, has disclosed the club’s unsuccessful bid to acquire Brazilian striker Vitor Roque from Barcelona during the recent transfer window. The Italian side’s interest in the 19-year-old was thwarted by Barcelona’s hefty price tag. “We tried to sign Vitor Roque, but the conditions were impossible at that time. Barcelona wanted €40 million for him, so there was no chance,” Pradè explained during a press conference. Roque, who struggled to make an impact at Barcelona under both Xavi Hernández and Hansi Flick, has since joined Real Betis on loan in search of more playing time. arts.ttl: Samardzic: ‘The Champions League a dream, but first let’s think about Fiorentina’
arts.sum: Lazar Samardzic, Atalanta’s new summer signing from Udinese, is set to make his home debut against Fiorentina. The midfielder shared his thoughts and excitement with the club’s official channels ahead of the match, explaining why he’s keen to feature in the Champions League. Samardzic expressed his eagerness to play at the Gewiss Stadium: “We are all ready, we can’t wait any longer. It will be my first game in the new stadium and I’m looking forward to it. The old stadium was always full, and now there are two more sections to accommodate even more fans.” While acknowledging the upcoming The post Samardzic: ‘The Champions League a dream, but first let’s think about Fiorentina’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Atalanta v Fiorentina: Match Preview
arts.sum: Atalanta and Fiorentina will face off on Sunday in a pivotal Serie A matchup, with both sides looking to jumpstart their seasons after slow starts. The two clubs have managed just three points each from their opening three matches, leaving them eager for a victory before kicking off their European campaigns next week. Atalanta enter the match reeling from back-to-back league defeats, including a 4-0 thrashing at the hands of Inter Milan before the international break. Manager Gian Piero Gasperini will be desperate to right the ship and avoid losing three of the club’s first four Serie A fixtures for The post Serie A | Atalanta v Fiorentina: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta race against time for Fiorentina clash amid defensive concerns
arts.sum: Atalanta are taking their upcoming match against Fiorentina very seriously, as evidenced by the club’s latest injury report. While Nicolo Zaniolo and Ibrahim Sulemana have fully recovered and will be available for selection, the team is racing against time to have Sead Kolasinac and Berat Djimsiti fit for the crucial fixture. Calciomercato report how Djimsiti, who was initially expected to return at the end of the month after sustaining an injury during his first training session with the national team, has made surprising progress. The Albanian defender participated in partial training with his teammates at Zingonia this afternoon, alongside Kolasinac. arts.ttl: Fiorentina Chief Reveals Summer Attempt to Sign Barcelona Outcast
arts.sum: Fiorentina sporting director Daniele Prade has opened up on the club's busted attempt to sign Vitor Roque from Barcelona during the summer transfer window. Prade admitted that La Viola tried to lure the Brazilian forward to Tuscany, only to be blown out of the water by the Catalan side's stratospheric demands. The post Fiorentina Chief Reveals Summer Attempt to Sign Barcelona Outcast appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
